content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of size NNN.

Consider the following steps:


Choose an integer kkk (1‚Č§k‚Č§N)(1 \leq k \leq N)(1‚Č§k‚Č§N);
Divide the range [1,N][1, N][1,N] into kkk intervals [li,ri][l_i,r_i][li‚Äč,ri‚Äč] (1‚Č§i‚Č§k)(1 \leq i \le k)(1‚Č§i‚Č§k) such that:

l1=1l_1=1l1‚Äč=1 and rk=Nr_k=Nrk‚Äč=N;
li+1=ri+1l_{i+1}=r_i+1li+1‚Äč=ri‚Äč+1 for all (1‚Č§i<k)(1 \leq i \lt k)(1‚Č§i<k).


The score of this split is defined as k‚ąí‚ąĎi=1kmax‚Ā°(Ali,Ali+1,‚Ä¶,Ari)k-\sum_{i=1}^k \max(A_{l_i},A_{l_{i}+1},\ldots,A_{r_i})k‚ąí‚ąĎi=1k‚Äčmax(Ali‚Äč‚Äč,Ali‚Äč+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Ari‚Äč‚Äč).
Find the **maximum** possible score of a split across all 1‚Č§k‚Č§N1 \leq k \leq N1‚Č§k‚Č§N.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of multiple lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN, the size of the array.
The next line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1,A_2,\ldots,A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč, the elements of the array.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, the **maximum** possible score of a split across all 1‚Č§k‚Č§N1 \leq k \leq N1‚Č§k‚Č§N.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 4‚čÖ1054\cdot 10^54‚čÖ105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: Choose k=3k=3k=3 and [l1,r1]=[1,1],[l2,r2]=[2,2],[l3,r3]=[3,3][l_1,r_1]=[1,1],[l_2,r_2]=[2,2],[l_3,r_3]=[3,3][l1‚Äč,r1‚Äč]=[1,1],[l2‚Äč,r2‚Äč]=[2,2],[l3‚Äč,r3‚Äč]=[3,3].
The score of this split is k‚ąí(max‚Ā°(A1)+max‚Ā°(A2)+max‚Ā°(A3))=3‚ąí(2‚ąí2+2)=1k-(\max(A_1)+\max(A_2)+\max(A_3))=3-(2-2+2)=1k‚ąí(max(A1‚Äč)+max(A2‚Äč)+max(A3‚Äč))=3‚ąí(2‚ąí2+2)=1. We can show that no other split for any kkk yields a score greater than ‚ąí4-4‚ąí4.
Test case 222: Choose k=1k=1k=1 and [l1,r1]=[1,3][l_1,r_1]=[1,3][l1‚Äč,r1‚Äč]=[1,3].
The score of this split is k‚ąí(max‚Ā°(A1,A2,A3))=1‚ąí5=‚ąí4k-(\max(A_1,A_2,A_3))=1-5=-4k‚ąí(max(A1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,A3‚Äč))=1‚ąí5=‚ąí4. We can show that no other split for any kkk yields a score greater than 111.
